creator: pmh@hausen.com
text:
I do not have a complete understanding of the scope of this problem and the proposed patch. I only stumbled on this pr because of the mention of Hetzner vswitches and assumed problems in that environment.

I am running an OPNsense (FreeBSD 14.1) HA cluster with CARP and a vswitch at Hetzner and everything seems to work as expected.

I can offer to gather and supply any data points from the live system if requested. I can do things with a bit of disruption like force a switchover later in the evenings.

Kind regards
Patrick
